attachments.fallback: Easy to convert NSF file to PST - @pradeepkatiyar
attachments.text:
Hi there,

Do you really need reliable software to convert your HCL Notes .nsf mailbox file into Outlook PST format? If so, then you can also use the Shoviv NSF to PST Converter tool.

<https://www.shoviv.com/nsf-to-pst-converter.html|Best NSF to PST Converter tool for HCL Notes Users>
